name: First-Time Farmer Land Acquisition Exception

eligibility.description: Applies to individuals who have not previously owned substantial farmland and will materially participate in the farm operation. Financing is limited to $450,000 (inflation-adjusted) for land and $62,500 for used equipment.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows the use of tax-exempt private activity bonds to finance the acquisition of farmland and used equipment for first-time farmers, bypassing the general 25% land acquisition limit.
